meta.title: William Broker Yacht & Boat — Charter & concierge, Amalfi Coast
meta.description: Boat and yacht charter with captain, helicopter and private NCC transfers, and vessel sales on the Amalfi Coast.

home.servicesTitle: Four ways to live the Mediterranean
home.servicesSubtitle: Charter, sky, land and brokerage — one standard of care.
home.svcCharterDesc: Days and weeks at sea, with captain
home.svcHelicopterDesc: Tours and transfers along the Coast
home.destSubtitle: From the Gulf of Naples to the western Mediterranean.
home.featuredSubtitle: Charter vessels and brokerage listings from our portfolio.
home.heliSubtitle: Tours, transfers and special moments. From €895.
home.trustSubtitle: A maritime concierge service on the Amalfi Coast.
home.pillar1Text: Days at sea, guided by a captain who knows every cove and every light.
home.pillar2Text: Private bookings, quiet transfers, attention to the details you never notice.
home.pillar3Text: Itineraries, timing and atmosphere shaped around you — never a catalogue.
home.pillar4Text: From Sorrento’s marina to Capri, Ischia and beyond: local roots, international gaze.

charter.title: Boat & yacht charter
charter.subtitle: Daily, weekly and monthly rental with an experienced captain.

helicopter.title: Helicopter transfers
helicopter.subtitle: Tours, connections and special moments on the Amalfi Coast.
helicopter.tourText: Naples, the Amalfi Coast and the Gulf Islands — views that stay with you. Routes shaped around light and flight time.
helicopter.transferText: Links between airports, villas and towns. Punctuality and discretion, like private aviation.
helicopter.weddingText: A romantic gesture from above: petals dancing over your day. Coordinated with care, without unnecessary noise.
helicopter.genderText: Coloured smoke in the sky — an intimate, memorable celebration, framed with restraint.

transfers.title: Private NCC transfers
transfers.subtitle: Chauffeured cars, non-scheduled — between airports, hotels, villas and harbours.
transfers.body1: Private NCC transfers complete the William Broker experience: quiet comfort, flexible timing and local knowledge between Naples, Sorrento and the Coast.
transfers.body2: Every journey is quoted on request, according to destination, schedule and service type.

sales.title: Yacht & boat sales
sales.subtitle: A curated selection of vessels for sale.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your plans, in confidence.
contact.formSuccessText: We will reply as soon as we can. Thank you for writing.

footer.tagline: Yacht brokerage, charter and concierge on the Amalfi Coast.
